absorption: Mevcut bar: delta +2 (minimal alis), ask_vol 3 vs bid_vol 1 = satis baskisi. Son 10 bardaki -62 delta sonrasi +2 delta = kurumsal satis sonrasi absorption.

htf_alignment: 5m BEAR + 15m BEAR + 4h BEAR = 3/4 BEARISH; 1h BULL uyumsuzluk olusturuyor ancak lower timeframes dominant.
session_bias: buy_sell_ratio 0.55 (satis dominansi) + session delta -2849210 (guclu satis baskisi) + sell_volume (6.2M) >> buy_volume (3.4M) = gunu kontrol eden satis.
reasoning: Session satis dominansi (-2849210 CVD) + lower timeframe BEAR trend + son bardaki negatif delta sonrasi minimal recovery + VAL (64552) alti fiyat = erken short setup, kurumsal satis absorption mevcut.
